languages.text: По телу пробегает волна тока, словно древний механизм огрызнулся, и он по-прежнему действует безупречно.

traits.locale_text: По телу пробегает волна тока, словно древний механизм огрызнулся, и он по-прежнему действует безупречно.

languages.text: A wave of current jolts through your body like a snarl from the ancient mechanism, and it continues functioning as perfectly as before.
languages.original_text: По телу пробегает волна тока, словно древний механизм огрызнулся, и он по-прежнему действует безупречно.

traits.locale_text: A wave of current jolts through your body like a snarl from the ancient mechanism, and it continues functioning as perfectly as before.
A wave of current jolts through your body like a snarl from the ancient mechanism, and it continues functioning as perfectly as before.
A wave of current jolts through your body like a snarl from the ancient mechanism, and it continues functioning as perfectly as before.

languages.text: Deinen Körper durchfährt eine Energiewoge aus dem alten Mechanismus, der weiterhin perfekt funktioniert.
languages.original_text: A wave of current jolts through your body like a snarl from the ancient mechanism, and it continues functioning as perfectly as before.

traits.locale_text: Deinen Körper durchfährt eine Energiewoge aus dem alten Mechanismus, der weiterhin perfekt funktioniert.

languages.text: 一股电流猛地贯穿你的身体，像是这个古老机械装置发出的咆哮，但它仍像之前一样完美地运转着。
languages.original_text: A wave of current jolts through your body like a snarl from the ancient mechanism, and it continues functioning as perfectly as before.

traits.locale_text: 一股电流猛地贯穿你的身体，像是这个古老机械装置发出的咆哮，但它仍像之前一样完美地运转着。

languages.text: Un courant électrique vous traverse, comme une protestation de l'ancien mécanisme, qui se remet ensuite à fonctionner normalement.
languages.original_text: A wave of current jolts through your body like a snarl from the ancient mechanism, and it continues functioning as perfectly as before.

traits.locale_text: Un courant électrique vous traverse, comme une protestation de l'ancien mécanisme, qui se remet ensuite à fonctionner normalement.

languages.text: Una intensa corriente recorre tu cuerpo como si fuese un rugido del antiguo mecanismo, que continúa funcionando tan bien como antes.
languages.original_text: A wave of current jolts through your body like a snarl from the ancient mechanism, and it continues functioning as perfectly as before.

traits.locale_text: Una intensa corriente recorre tu cuerpo como si fuese un rugido del antiguo mecanismo, que continúa funcionando tan bien como antes.

languages.text: Vücudundan kadim mekanizmanın hırıltısı gibi bir elektrik akımı geçiyor ve eskisi kadar mükemmel işlemeye devam ediyor.
languages.original_text: A wave of current jolts through your body like a snarl from the ancient mechanism, and it continues functioning as perfectly as before.

traits.locale_text: Vücudundan kadim mekanizmanın hırıltısı gibi bir elektrik akımı geçiyor ve eskisi kadar mükemmel işlemeye devam ediyor.

languages.text: 古き機械の唸り声のように、電流が全身を駆け巡り、その機能は以前と変わらず完璧に動作を続ける。
languages.original_text: A wave of current jolts through your body like a snarl from the ancient mechanism, and it continues functioning as perfectly as before.

traits.locale_text: 古き機械の唸り声のように、電流が全身を駆け巡り、その機能は以前と変わらず完璧に動作を続ける。
